description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CentOS CI that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a centos:7 container that installs dependencies, sets up Xvfb, caches pyenv, installs Python 3.9.1, checks out the repository, caches third-party packages, builds BioDynaMo with specific CMake options, runs unit tests, and notifies Slack with a custom message on success, failure, or cancellation.
